# QUERY_NOTIFICATION_REASON_RECORD_DELETED

****

A record matching the subscription’s predicate was deleted.

## Declaration

```swift
const String QUERY_NOTIFICATION_REASON_RECORD_DELETED;
```

## Constants

- **QUERY_NOTIFICATION_REASON_RECORD_CREATED**: A record matching the subscription’s predicate was created.
- **QUERY_NOTIFICATION_REASON_RECORD_UPDATED**: A record matching the subscription’s predicate was updated.
